Records.description: 4-loop traintrack integral involving a Calabi-Yau threefold. 4-loop traintrack with 13 massless propagators, 14 massless external legs grouped into 10 momenta. Finite and dual-conformally invariant in d=4. Involves weight-5 hyperlogarithms integrated over an irreducible smooth Calabi-Yau threefold, elliptically fibered over P^2. Weierstrass coefficients g_2(z1,z2) and g_3(z1,z2) have degrees specified in Eq. (13). Verified to have trivial canonical sheaf using Macaulay2.
Records.location: Eq. (1), Sec. Calabi-Yaus at Higher Loops
